---
name: Bug report
about: Report a correctness issue, typed failure issue, or unexpected edit result
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What happened?

## Expected behavior

What should have happened instead?

## Transaction

If applicable, include the `transaction.sprigcode.json`.

## Workspace shape

Include the smallest relevant source snippet or fixture layout.

## Actual output

Include:

- CLI output
- JSON output
- typed error code
- diff if one was produced

## Reproduction

List the exact commands to reproduce.

## Why this matters

Explain whether this is:

- a wrong edit
- a missing refusal
- an incorrect typed error
- a packaging or docs issue
